data.content: History now treats worktree repo paths as equivalent to the active repo filter (including .claude/worktrees and sibling -wt- paths), merges those sessions into canonical repo rows, and includes them in beat session detail queries. Added regression test coverage in agent-history.test.ts. Quality gates passed: bun run lint (warnings only), tsc --noEmit (bunx blocked by policy), bun run test, bun run build. Pushed to origin/main at b359a28.
